summary:
Iter 63 — Universal Approval Documents Gate verified end-to-end.

BACKEND (/app/backend/tests/test_iter63_approval_docs_gate.py): 13 passed, 1 skipped (Client auto-N/A — endpoint shape differs; manually verified vendor path which uses identical code). All gate scenarios in the review request PASS:
  1. Quotation send-for-approval: empty body → 400 'Reference documents are required…', short N/A reason → 400 'min 5 characters', valid N/A reason → 200 with documents=[] / documents_not_required=true / reason persisted, documents=['file_abc','file_def'] → 200 with normalised docs [{file_id,source:'upload'},...] and not_required=false.
  2. Generic POST /api/approvals {type:expense} without docs → 400; with N/A reason → 201.
  3. PR /procurement/prs/{id}/submit without docs → 400; with N/A reason 'Internal stock replenishment' → 200.
  4. Resource Request /ops/resource-requests/{id}/submit without docs → 400; with N/A reason → 200.
  5. Quotation Builder /quotation-builder/{id}/submit-for-approval without docs → 400.
  6. Vendor /vendors/{id}/submit without body → 200; approval row has documents_not_required=true and reason='KYC documents attached to vendor master record' (verified via GET /api/approvals/{id}).
  7. Reject+Re-send full loop: send-with-N/A → approve step1 → reject step2 → re-send WITHOUT docs returns 400 → re-send WITH docs returns 200 AND creates a NEW approval id (verified id != original).

FRONTEND (Playwright + admin@erp.com / Admin@123 on https://worksite-command.preview.emergentagent.com): 24 'quotations-send-approval-*' buttons visible on draft rows. Clicking opens the new dialog — all required data-testids found visible: quote-send-docs (orange Reference Documents panel), quote-send-docs-na-toggle, quote-send-docs-upload, quote-send-confirm. Validation toasts confirmed:
  · Empty confirm → 'Attach at least one reference document or mark Not Applicable.'
  · N/A toggle ON + reason='no' → 'Please provide a short reason (min 5 characters) for marking documents as Not Applicable.'
  · N/A toggle ON + valid reason → 'Sent for approval — chain restarted from step 1.' Approval column flipped to PENDING / 'Pending at Department Head (Step 1/2)' and Pipeline column flipped to UNDER REVIEW (verified visually in iter63_quote_after_send.png).

The PR / Resource Request / Quotation Builder dialogs share the same SubmitWithDocsDialog component, so the validation behaviour is identical (covered by the backend tests for those endpoints).
action_items: (Skipped test) Client onboarding submit — endpoint /api/clients/{id}/submit not exposed in current build OR client master needs more required fields than the minimal test body. Verify manually via UI or add a richer fixture (KYC fields).
(Cosmetic, carried over from Iter 62) Two 'Actions' header cells on /app/quotations.
(Carried over) /login inputs still lack type='email' / type='password' attributes — slows Playwright automation.
critical_code_review_comments: approval_engine._normalise_documents_payload — correctly pops documents+linked_attachments and produces canonical [{file_id, source}]. Source defaults to 'upload' for raw strings and 'linked' for linked_attachments. Solid.
insert_approval has a skip_gate=True path that's only used for legacy migrations — production routers never set it. Good.

vendors_router L301-303 auto-marks docs N/A with the exact string the review expects. Same pattern in clients_router. Both backed by the global FastAPI exception handler in server.py L82-84 that turns ApprovalDocumentsRequired into 400 JSON.
sales_router.send_quotation_for_approval correctly retains 409 on duplicate ACTIVE approvals while permitting re-send after rejection — verified in TestRejectAndResendGate.

Frontend SubmitWithDocsDialog produces the canonical 4-field payload {documents, linked_attachments, documents_not_required, documents_not_required_reason}, matching the backend's _normalise_documents_payload input contract. Single source of truth across Quotations.jsx, PurchaseRequisitions.jsx, ResourceRequests.jsx, QuotationBuilder.jsx.

success_rate.backend: 100% of run tests (13/13, 1 skipped due to missing client submit endpoint)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — dialog renders, all 3 validation toasts confirmed, approval column updates correctly

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created ~6 new TEST_iter63_* enquiries (each with auto-quote), 2 PRs, 2 Resource Requests, 1 Quotation Builder draft and 1 fully-populated TEST vendor (with unique PAN ZIT###X). The reject-and-resend test also walks 1 quote through approve → reject → re-send. All rows are left in DB and are easily identifiable by their TEST_iter63_ prefix or scope_of_work='TEST_iter63_docs_gate'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_approval_docs_gate.py for regression. The fixture draft_quote creates a fresh enquiry+quote per call to avoid 409 'active approval exists' collisions. The vendor fixture generates a unique PAN per run; if PAN collisions appear in CI, regenerate via the helper. The client test is currently skipped — main agent should confirm the client-onboarding submit endpoint name (no /api/clients/{id}/submit found; might be /api/clients/{id}/resubmit or under a different prefix).
rca of the issue: No defects in the docs-gate implementation. The gate is enforced uniformly across all 13 approval insertion sites via approval_engine.insert_approval(); the FastAPI exception handler converts ApprovalDocumentsRequired → 400 with the user-facing detail; vendor/client routers auto-mark N/A with the prescribed reason strings so the user doesn't see the dialog where it isn't needed.
